titleStmt.title: SII 15.131: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 131. (B.K. No. 86 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab lying in front of the chāvaḍi.
This is dated Śaka 1101, Viḷambi, Vaiśākha śu. 13, Monday, corresponding to 1178 A.D., May 1. The Śaka year was current.

It registers a gift of land to the god Vidirēśvara by the Nagara-Mahājanas of Muḷugunda, Pura and Paṁchamaṭha-sthāna of Maddumambaḷa and Five Hundred after washing the feet of Vāmaśakti-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 198 of South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. XI, pt.
div.p:
© svasti śrīmatkaḷacu¨ryya bhujabaḷacakrava¨rtti nissaṁkamalla saṁkamadēva vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . sakanripa va¨rṣa 1101 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada
vaisākha suddha trayōdasi sōmavāra saṁkrānti vyatīpātadandu śrīmadanādipaṭṭaṇaṁ muḷuguṁdade
nagaramahājanaṁ maddumaṁbaḷa pura paṁcamaṭasthānavainū¨rvvaru pramukhavāgi . śrī vidirēśvaradēva
rācā¨ryya vāmaśaktipaṁḍitadēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi vidirēśvaradēvara naivē dyakke ko
ṭṭa gaḷaya mattaru nālku . Adara sīma . mūḍalu kusuvēśyara kaiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu haḷḷa . Adaṟiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu baḍagalu . sōbhanēśvarada holana mēre . mantaṁ(ttaṁ) tōṁṭṭa takkilu Aravanta(tta)ru . Adara sīme svayaṁbhudēvara tōṁṭa
diṁ teṁkalu Adara sutalu kāḷibageṟe Ēri mēre . Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rgge Ananta puṇya
Idanaḷidava[¨rnna]rakakke gaḷagaḷaniḷivaru . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
